strengths: 16+ years of software engineering across diverse stacks and domains, satisfying the minimum tenure requirement
Recent hands-on AI agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic workflows at re:cinq) shows current technical orientation toward AI tooling
Entrepreneurial background with GISCollective (founded 2016, ongoing) plus community contributions via talks and OSS projects
concerns: AI involvement is very recent (April 2025) and limited to developer tooling — no demonstrated track record building AI-powered products or platforms at scale
No cloud platform architecture experience at the strategic depth the role demands; background is application-layer and backend services
No evidence of director-level strategic influence, customer advisory work, or cross-organizational thought leadership that would justify a principal/director IC positioning
response.justification: Bogdan is a capable, versatile engineer with genuine breadth across stacks and a long career, but the profile does not align with a director-level AI strategy role. AI exposure is narrow and very recent, consisting of MCP tooling at a single employer since April 2025, with no demonstrated AI products or platforms with measurable impact. Cloud expertise is absent beyond standard deployment tooling. Most critically, the resume shows no evidence of the strategic customer advisory, enterprise-level thought leadership, or cross-organizational influence that defines this role. The GISCollective founder experience is a positive signal but operates at NGO/niche scale, which does not translate to the enterprise cloud and AI strategy context required.
